settings.mode.heading: Settings view
settings.mode.description: Simple keeps the everyday controls up front. Advanced restores the full settings surface.
settings.mode.advancedToast: Advanced settings show deeper engine, style, and vocabulary controls.
settings.migration.title: Legacy dictionary reset
settings.migration.description: An older merged dictionary was backed up and reset so industry packs are scoped correctly now. Your active pack setting was kept, but personal terms and rules need to be re-added if they lived only in the old merged file.
general.language.label: Language
general.microphone.heading: Microphone
general.sounds.heading: Sounds
general.sounds.enableDescription: Play audio feedback when recording starts and stops
general.startup.heading: Startup
general.startup.launchDescription: Start YOLO Voice automatically when you log in
general.startup.minimizedDescription: Hide the main window on launch, only show tray icon
general.pill.label: Show pill indicator
general.pill.description: Keep the recording pill visible on screen even when not recording
general.mediaPause.label: Auto-pause media
general.mediaPause.description: Toggle media playback when recording starts and stops
hotkeys.dictationHotkey.heading: Dictation Hotkey
hotkeys.dictationHotkey.label: Key binding
hotkeys.activationMode.heading: Activation Mode
hotkeys.activationMode.manualDescription: Hold to record, or double-tap the hotkey to start and stop dictation manually.
hotkeys.activationMode.voiceDescription: Press once to arm listening, start speaking naturally, and let silence finish the utterance automatically.
hotkeys.activationMode.voiceRequiresOffl: Voice activated mode only works with offline transcription.
hotkeys.activationMode.voiceRequiresPara: Voice activated mode requires the Parakeet engine.
hotkeys.activationMode.voiceRequiresSegm: Voice activated mode requires Fast segmented mode.
hotkeys.activationMode.resetToast: Voice activated mode was turned off because it only works with offline Parakeet segmented mode.
hotkeys.recordingModes.heading: Recording Modes
hotkeys.recordingModes.holdDescription: Press and hold the hotkey → speak → release to stop and transcribe
hotkeys.recordingModes.toggleDescription: Quick double-press → recording persists → press again to stop
hotkeys.recordingModes.note: Both modes work automatically with the same hotkey — no need to choose.
hotkeys.continuous.heading: Continuous Mode
hotkeys.continuous.label: Continuous recording
hotkeys.continuous.description: After each dictation is transcribed, recording restarts automatically. Press the hotkey again to stop.
hotkeys.continuous.disabledVoiceDescript: Continuous recording is only available in manual mode. Voice activated dictation finishes each utterance automatically.
transcription.engine.heading: Engine
transcription.presets.heading: Recommended presets
transcription.presets.fastest.label: Fastest
transcription.presets.bestQuality.label: Best Quality
transcription.presets.handsFree.label: Hands-Free
transcription.presets.handsFree.descript: Parakeet segmented mode with voice activation.
transcription.presets.coding.label: Coding
transcription.presets.coding.description: Parakeet with rawer output and spoken punctuation.
transcription.trust.title: Storage & privacy
transcription.trust.offlineLine: Offline transcription keeps recorded audio on this device. Local models are stored in your app data folder.
transcription.trust.cloudLine: Cloud transcription sends recorded audio directly to {{provider}} for transcription.
transcription.trust.historyLine: Transcript history is still stored locally on this device after transcription finishes.
transcription.offline.textCleanupDescrip: Remove hard fillers, fix restart stutters, and shape joined dictation into cleaner sentences
transcription.offline.accuracyBoostDescr: Keep fast preview updates, then run a smarter final offline pass on longer or unstable dictation to improve language consistency
transcription.offline.numeralsDescriptio: Convert spoken number words to digits (e.g. "twenty three" becomes "23")
transcription.offline.hallucinationFilte: Remove phantom phrases (e.g. "thank you for watching") and repetition loops that models produce on silence
transcription.offline.spokenPunctuationD: Say "period", "comma", "question mark", "new line" etc. to insert punctuation (English only)
textActions.description: Text Actions let you speak once and run a saved rewrite on the transcript. Use the same backend settings as before, but package common transformations as reusable actions.
textActions.hotkey.heading: Text Action Hotkey
textActions.hotkey.label: Text action hotkey
textActions.actions.heading: Saved Actions
textActions.actions.promptHint: This prompt defines how the selected text action rewrites dictated text. The model always receives the source text separately and should return only the final text.
textActions.actions.newActionPrompt: Rewrite the source text to be clearer while preserving the meaning. Return only the final text.
textActions.quickPicker.heading: Current default action
textActions.quickPicker.description: This is the action your text action hotkey runs right now.
textActions.api.heading: Backend Settings
textActions.api.description: All text actions share the current provider, model, API key, and base URL from the existing text-action backend.
textActions.trust.title: Storage & provider use
textActions.trust.ollamaLine: When you run a text action with Ollama, dictated text plus the selected action prompt stay on this device through your local Ollama setup.
textActions.trust.cloudLine: When you run a text action, dictated text plus the selected action prompt are sent to {{provider}}.
textActions.trust.configLine: API keys and base URL are stored locally in your app config.
vocabulary.general.name: User Vocabulary
vocabulary.general.description: Always active. Your personal terms and rules apply to all transcriptions.
vocabulary.editor.addTermHint: AI generates common misspelling variants as substitution rules.
vocabulary.editor.noNewVariants: No new variants found — all generated variants already exist.
vocabulary.editor.noVariants: No variants generated for this term.
vocabulary.editor.noTerms: No terms yet. Add one above.
vocabulary.editor.removeTermTitle: Remove term and all its rules
vocabulary.editor.noSubstitutionRules: No substitution rules for this term
profiles.description: Hold dictation key + style's shortcut key to apply a style during recording. Uses openai/gpt-oss-120b via Groq.
history.empty: No transcriptions yet. Start dictating to build your history.
history.entry.selectWords: Select words to add to your dictionary:
history.clear.confirm: Clear all transcription history? This removes every saved history item.
history.trust.title: Local storage
history.trust.description: Transcript history is stored locally in the app diagnostics database on this device.
history.trust.clearLine: Clearing history removes those saved entries from local storage.
about.description: A Windows-first, offline-focused voice dictation app. Speak naturally and your words appear wherever you type.
about.keyboardShortcuts.heading: Keyboard Shortcuts
about.keyboardShortcuts.holdValue: Hold hotkey to record, release to stop
about.keyboardShortcuts.toggleValue: Double-press to start, single press to stop
about.storage.heading: Local storage
about.storage.description: These are the main local storage locations YOLO Voice uses on this device.
about.footer: Created by Alisher Mutaliyev. Privacy-first: audio is processed locally by default.
updater.heading: Updates
model.cpuFallbackNotice: Using CPU mode, which may be slower than GPU.
model.diskSize: Parakeet TDT model (~2.4 GB on disk).
model.deleteConfirm: Delete the speech model? This frees ~2.4 GB but you'll need to re-download it to use offline transcription.
model.download.initializingMessage: Loading model into memory... This may take a moment.
model.notDownloaded.message: Speech model not downloaded yet (~2.4 GB).
llm.provider.groq.name: Groq
llm.provider.groq.desc: Ultra-fast inference. GPT-OSS 120B. Requires API key.
llm.provider.ollama.name: Ollama (Local)
llm.provider.ollama.desc: Free, runs locally. Requires Ollama installed.
llm.provider.openai.name: OpenAI
llm.provider.openai.desc: GPT-4o-mini or GPT-4o. Requires API key.
llm.provider.claude.name: Claude (Anthropic)
llm.provider.claude.desc: Claude Sonnet or Haiku. Requires API key.
onboarding.progress.label: First-run setup
onboarding.welcome.title: Get to your first dictation fast
onboarding.welcome.description: YOLO Voice is offline-first dictation that inserts text anywhere. We’ll get your microphone ready, choose the transcription path, and test one short phrase before you start using it in real apps.
onboarding.welcome.hotkeyDescription: After setup, press this hotkey, speak naturally, then release or stop to insert text in the app you were already using.
onboarding.welcome.promiseDescription: You do not need to tune models or advanced settings to get started. We’ll keep the setup focused on a first success.
onboarding.engine.title: Choose your transcription path
onboarding.engine.description: Offline is the recommended starting point. Cloud is available if you prefer to use your own provider and API key.
onboarding.engine.offlineDescription: Uses Parakeet locally on your device. After the one-time model download, dictation works without sending audio to a cloud provider.
onboarding.engine.offlineTrust: Best default for privacy and a clean first-run experience.
onboarding.engine.cloudDescription: Uses Groq or Deepgram directly with your own API key. Fast to start, but your audio is sent to the provider you choose.
onboarding.engine.cloudTrust: No middleman: audio goes directly from your machine to your selected provider.
onboarding.download.title: Download the offline model
onboarding.download.description: YOLO Voice needs one local model download before offline dictation is ready. Once it’s installed, your audio can stay on your machine for the default dictation flow.
onboarding.download.modelDescription: 25 languages with auto-detection. GPU accelerated via DirectML (AMD, Intel, NVIDIA).
onboarding.download.initializingNote: This may take a moment. The app may be briefly unresponsive.
onboarding.test.title: Test one short dictation
onboarding.test.description: This test transcribes inside setup only. It does not paste into another app. Once you see a good transcript here, you’ll be ready for real dictation.
onboarding.test.helper: Press start, say the phrase out loud, then stop to see the transcript inline.
onboarding.test.stateNote: This test stays inside onboarding and never inserts text into another app.
onboarding.test.cloudKeyRequired: Enter your API key before testing cloud transcription.
onboarding.done.title: You’re ready to dictate
onboarding.done.description: Your first transcript worked. The real workflow now happens in whatever app you already use.
onboarding.done.nextStep1: Focus any app where you want text inserted, then press {{hotkey}}.
onboarding.done.nextStep2: Speak naturally, then release or stop recording when you’re done.
onboarding.done.nextStep3: YOLO Voice will transcribe and insert the text for you.
onboarding.done.gpuWarning: GPU acceleration is not available. Transcription will use CPU, which may be slower. Ensure your GPU drivers are up to date.
pill.listening.label: Listening for speech
engine.offline.speedCpu: Fast, slightly slower than GPU (~1-3s for 10s audio)
engine.offline.privacyNote: Runs fully offline. No data leaves your machine.
engine.cloud.privacyNoteGroq: Requires API key. Audio is sent to Groq servers for processing.
engine.cloud.privacyNoteDeepgram: Requires API key. Audio is sent to Deepgram servers for processing.
